title: Aehr Test Systems Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Aehr Test Systems reported challenging quarterly performance in Q3 2024. Total revenue of $7.6 million represented a significant 56% decline from $17.2 million in the prior year period. Gross margin contracted to 41.7% compared to 51.6% year-over-year. However, bookings showed strength at $24.5 million for Q3, up substantially from $2.2 million in Q2 of fiscal 2024. The company maintained a healthy $20 million backlog and a robust balance sheet with $47.6 million in cash and no debt. WaferPak systems generated $4.8 million, accounting for 63% of total revenue. The company has secured seven silicon carbide customers for its FOX-P system family and is engaged with over a dozen additional potential clients in this segment. Management indicated there is visibility that all current customers are expected to generate material revenues in the next fiscal year, particularly regarding electric vehicle opportunities in Asia. Revenue delays stemmed from customer order postponements and softness in the overall semiconductor capital spending. The company faces competitive pressures and is developing strategies for the China market through both direct sales and local partnerships.
